author: barnabasbusa
content:
sorry for being a bit hands off on https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/606 PR. A few issues that have been raised is generally whether we want to have a strict list of downscore / disconnect reason, or should we leave that field to be populated by whatever strings clients wanna fill it with. 

The main reason I would be more keen on keeping it an enum vs random string is that way we could standardize these reasons once and for all. 

I also understand that different clients would have different penalities or downscore reasons, and this list might grow too big. Would most clients prefer to have just have a random list? That way going forward we would have less burden on keeping the list up to date?
